text: B9 ASG Health Checks @ msancanio. © s ¢ EC2 (Default), ELB (Can be enabled) & Custom ¢ EC2 - Stopping, Stopped, Terminated, Shutting Down or Impaired (not 2/2 status) = UNHEALTHY ¢ ELB - HEALTHY = Running & passing ELB health check e ... can be more application aware (Layer 7) e Custom - Instances marked healthy & unhealthy by an external system. * Health check grace period (Default 300s) - Delay before starting checks ¢ ... allows system launch, bootstrapping and application start
